sections.title: preservation
sections.evidence: Named recovery tips and immutable stash backups are on origin; dirty source worktrees remain untouched.

sections.title: marketing component lexicon
sections.evidence: Reusable React validation enforces the strict cross-stack surface map for admin and marketing.

sections.title: website primitives shim
sections.evidence: The shadowing file shim is deleted; the family-split directory is canonical.

sections.title: governance documentation
sections.evidence: Current mechanisms are documented and protected by the monotonic version ratchet.

sections.title: profile prompt disclosure
sections.evidence: Completed prompts plus exactly the next slot render through the finalized field API.

sections.title: orphaned l10n keys
sections.evidence: All 97 reviewed zero-reference keys were pruned; 2774 of 2774 catalog keys are used.

sections.title: strict event location
sections.evidence: Compatibility is complete and tested; strict activation waits for repair of 9 production blockers.

sections.title: adaptive tab scaffold
sections.evidence: Both shells adopt keyboard-safe CatchAdaptiveTabScaffold behavior.

sections.title: surface map strictness
sections.evidence: Every declared component symbol has an object-valued surface mapping.

sections.title: bottom action ownership
sections.evidence: CatchBottomAction owns primary CTA composition; CatchBottomDock no longer has the rich CTA variant.

sections.title: hand-merged residuals
sections.evidence: All 248 both-diverged paths have exact semantic reviews; all 1173 exact discards have strict receipts.

sections.title: design context exports
sections.evidence: Exports were regenerated from current canonical sources.

sections.title: active-session boundaries
sections.evidence: Original dirty work and both source-worktree backups were preserved without overwrite.

sections.title: prevention controls
sections.evidence: Push/rerere defaults, snapshot rules, merge auditing, doc ratchet, branch lifecycle, and no-shared-rewrite rules are active.

sections.title: cross-codebase improvements
sections.evidence: All seven listed improvements have implementation, generated artifacts, or enforcement tests.

sections.title: execution order
sections.evidence: Restore, decisions, exhaustive audit, preservation, and cleanup were executed in order.

productionDataBoundary.reason: Nine coordinate-less production events require owner-reviewed repair before fail-closed reads can activate.

cleanup.evidenceAmendmentWorktreeDisposition: The temporary /private/tmp/catch-reconciliation-finalize worktree used to record this post-push fact is removed immediately after this amendment is pushed and is not counted as an audit worktree.
cleanup.policy: All 38 audit-classified safe-delete and closeout worktrees were removed non-forcibly after remote preservation. Local branches were deleted only when git branch -d accepted them; 13 refusals remain as harmless remote-backed provenance refs.

preservedWorktrees.reason: Original 203-path dirty source worktree; explicitly out of cleanup scope.

outOfAuditWorktreesRetained.reason: Not named by the reconciliation audit.
Not named by the reconciliation audit; deleting a main worktree requires separate scope.
Not named by the reconciliation audit.
Not named by the reconciliation audit; preserved rather than force-cleaned.
Not named by the reconciliation audit.

verification.result: Exit 0; 274 information findings; 0 warnings; 0 errors after the full l10n prune.
861 passing focused Flutter test executions across the reconciliation workstreams.
11 scanner tests; 2774/2774 used catalog keys; zero orphans; zero missing getters.
Generated schemas synchronized; contract/rules checks and 163 Flutter tests passed.
Both React tests, typechecks, builds, Storybook builds, architecture checks, and budgets passed.
75 tests plus operations check and smoke passed.
64 component contracts, 35 screens/239 sections, 880 components/929 builders/930 references, and selected scanners passed.
Final evidence-state result: 100/100 and 3069/3069 checks passed.

advisories.note: Improved from 122 unresolved candidates to 114; this pre-existing catalog queue is not an unreviewed reconciliation drop.

historicalClassifications.subject: Point development clients at catchdates-dev
historicalClassifications.evidence: All four Firebase client configuration files match the preserved commit at the audited target head.

historicalClassifications.evidence: The preserved copy and website series is represented by squash commit d21761dbe; its final source tree matches 0704ca480 exactly.

historicalClassifications.evidence: Mapped by git range-diff to d21761dbe and included in its exact final source tree.

historicalClassifications.evidence: The full tree at 0704ca480 is identical to squash commit d21761dbe.

historicalClassifications.evidence: Squash commit 4e7594281 contains the preserved operations foundation plus the completed workflow platform.

historicalClassifications.evidence: Squash commit 4e7594281 contains and extends the preserved supply-intake engine.

historicalClassifications.subject: chore(wip): preserve pending reconciliation snapshot
recoveredIntent: Consumer Profile accepts SelfProfileTab and renders a typed CatchTabControllerRail.
Host Preview retirement is represented consistently by Firebase redirects, route and component contracts, Storybook coverage, and canonical Host-page ownership.
Marketing copy migration has zero baseline debt, generated copy call sites, an exact allowlist, and matching metadata and documentation.
supersededIntent: The snapshot's CatchBottomDock CTA removal is superseded by the reviewed bottom-dock versus bottom-action component decision and current catalog contracts.
The snapshot's prototype-lab deletion is not production behavior and was intentionally not imported.
Older widget-family implementations are superseded by 5785b9aaf, ee0e383a5, b94237f0e, and 971216df8.

historicalClassifications.subject: test(hosts): attach analytics rows to scroll-offset case
historicalClassifications.evidence: The current Host test keeps generated analytics rows on the independent-scroll-offset case.

supersededBlockers.evidence: The full repository analyzer still exits nonzero on pre-existing missing integration-test harness imports and providers; the four recovered Profile and capture files analyze without errors.
The recovered WEB-COPY-001 sunset review is valid; unrelated existing storage-IAM, provider-topology, repository-hygiene, and reverse tool-rule bindings remain invalid.
The readiness report scores 100/100 but exits nonzero because seven existing regression-guard command-path findings remain.
